title: habenaria incarnata
intro: Habenaria incarnata, also known as the pinkish-yellow lady's tresses, is a species of orchid native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Habenaria incarnata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory issues. Habenaria incarnata can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
